channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet

item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 22nd May
item.description:
Damaged Street Furniture CW 1 x SV Cover in hours 2hr Emergency Stop and go TM MAKE SAFE ONLY...S81 Will be raised Stats Required (Damaged Street Furniture)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole on roundabout, 22nd May
item.description:
2 foot and 2foot wide deep pothole. Dangerous to motorcycle and cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge Court Roundabout, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 22nd May
item.description:
Customer reports that black tape has been placed over the no entry signs. Traffic is now going the wrong way through what is a One Way system, which is dangerous. They report that no notice was given for these works and the situation is dangerous; they were nearly knocked over. They query what is happening and when this will be rectified?
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 1x10 inch hole, approx 5ft past door in school building., 22nd May
item.description:
As above + another very nearby.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardners Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
